name: Murf AI Voice Contributor
reason: Creators contribute voice recordings and earn per-approved dataset; voice artists earn ongoing royalties every time their AI voice avatar is used by a Murf customer. Explicit 'Fair Play & Fair Pay' policy. Earnings from MAKING content (recording voice), not referrals.
payoutModel: One-time payment per approved voice dataset + ongoing royalties per use of voice avatar
payoutRange: Royalties per use (variable); lump sum for dataset
notes: Requires min 20 min continuous audio, clear quality, no background noise. Separate program for voice actors wanting a personal AI avatar. Active as of 2025-2026.

name: Adobe Firefly Contributor Bonus
reason: Adobe Stock contributors whose content was used to train Firefly receive an annual bonus payment on top of regular stock earnings. Creators earn by submitting photos/illustrations/video to Adobe Stock, plus Firefly-generated images can also be submitted to Adobe Stock for sale.
payoutModel: Annual Firefly training bonus (variable) + regular Adobe Stock royalties per download
payoutRange: Variable bonus (discretionary); Stock royalties 20-35% per download
notes: 2025 Firefly bonus paid Sept 17, 2025. Based on content used June 2024–June 2025. Adobe Stock is the entry point; Firefly bonus is additive. Not a standalone program.

name: Suno AI Music (Commercial Rights)
reason: No direct platform revenue share. Pro/Premier subscribers get commercial rights to AI music they make, then monetize independently (Spotify, YouTube, licensing). Suno ran a 'Summer of Suno' $1M creator payout in June 2024 but no recurring program in 2025-2026.
payoutModel: Creators own commercial rights, self-distribute to streaming platforms
payoutRange: Depends entirely on external distribution success
notes: SKIP for CreatorVault — no direct platform earnings. Creators must go through external distributors. Not a 'program'. One-time 2024 contest only.

name: Udio AI Music
reason: No direct creator revenue share in 2025. Paid tiers grant commercial rights for external monetization. However, Udio's 2026 licensed platform (post-UMG/WMG settlement) promises creator revenue opportunities for those who opt-in to AI remixing.
payoutModel: Upcoming 2026: revenue share for artists whose work is used in AI remixes. Currently: commercial rights only for self-distribution.
notes: Watch for 2026 launch of licensed platform. Could become a verified gem. Currently not a CreatorVault-eligible program — no direct creator payout.

name: Fanvue Creator Program
reason: Active OnlyFans alternative. Creators post exclusive content (photos, videos, live streams) and earn subscriptions, tips, PPV. 85% revenue share for first 30 days post-KYC, then 80% ongoing. Confirmed active as of Jan 2026.
payoutModel: Subscriptions + tips + pay-per-view content. 80% creator revenue share (85% first 30 days).
notes: Creator earns by making content (exclusive photos/videos/lives). No referral required. KYC required to unlock payouts. Strong OnlyFans alternative with better revenue split.

name: Passes Creator Platform
reason: Creator membership platform where creators earn via subscriptions, PPV, DMs, livestreams, and digital products. Platform fee as low as 10% (or 0% on Shop for up to a year). Surpassed $1B in creator payouts in early 2025 with 140% YoY growth in active creators.
payoutModel: Subscriptions, pay-per-view, DMs, e-commerce, live tips. 90% creator share (10% platform fee); 100% on Shop sales (limited promo).
notes: Lucy Guo-founded. $1B+ in creator payouts. Instant payout available (10% fee) or free in 3-5 days. $50 minimum payout. Strong momentum — 140% YoY creator growth.

name: Supercast Podcast Subscriptions
reason: Podcast creators earn recurring subscription revenue by offering premium content (ad-free, bonus episodes, early access). Flat fee model: $0.59/subscriber/month, no revenue percentage cut. Top 10 creators earn $26M+ annually. Acquired by Fox Red Seat Ventures Feb 2026.
payoutModel: Direct subscription revenue from listeners. Flat $0.59/subscriber/month fee; 15% on one-time payments (max $1.50).
notes: Creator earns by making podcast content. No revenue %. Flat fee means high earners keep more. Acquired by Fox Corp Feb 2026 — stable. Acast partnership expands reach.

name: Lemon Squeezy Digital Products
reason: Creator sells digital products (templates, ebooks, software, courses). 5% + $0.50 per transaction, no monthly fee, handles tax compliance as Merchant of Record. Acquired by Stripe in 2024; Stripe payments integrated 2025. Very creator-friendly for digital content.
payoutModel: Creators sell their own digital content. Platform takes 5% + $0.50/transaction. Payouts 2x/month.
notes: Best for digital product creators (templates, SaaS, ebooks). 0% payout fee for US bank accounts. Stripe-backed reliability. Not content-based earnings — product sales.
